query:
SELECT taxId, COUNT(*) AS cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id) AS ws_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name) AS names
FROM workspaces
WHERE taxId IS NOT NULL AND taxId <> ''
GROUP BY taxId
HAVING cnt > 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ScXmtJuaTeKxeck.a823cb61aea9 --database ZqvPyEVdTkw9DPvc2ezGwV --execute SELECT taxId, COUNT(*) AS cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id) AS ws_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name) AS names
FROM workspaces
